# Clawperator Documentation

This site contains the canonical technical documentation for Clawperator, a deterministic Android automation runtime for AI agents. Clawperator is the actuator. Your external agent or LLM is the brain.

## Key pages

- Docs home: https://docs.clawperator.com/
- Setup: https://docs.clawperator.com/setup/
- API overview: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/overview/
- CLI reference: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/cli/
- Actions: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/actions/
- Selectors: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/selectors/
- Snapshot format: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/snapshot/
- Errors: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/errors/
- Devices: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/devices/
- Doctor: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/doctor/
- Timeouts: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/timeouts/
- Environment variables: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/environment/
- Serve API: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/serve/
- Navigation patterns: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/navigation/
- Recording format: https://docs.clawperator.com/api/recording/
- Skills overview: https://docs.clawperator.com/skills/overview/
- Skill authoring: https://docs.clawperator.com/skills/authoring/
- Skill development workflow: https://docs.clawperator.com/skills/development/
- Device prep and runtime: https://docs.clawperator.com/skills/runtime/
- Operator troubleshooting: https://docs.clawperator.com/troubleshooting/operator/
- Known issues: https://docs.clawperator.com/troubleshooting/known-issues/
- Version compatibility: https://docs.clawperator.com/troubleshooting/compatibility/
- Full compiled docs on docs host: https://docs.clawperator.com/llms-full.txt
- Full compiled docs on landing host: https://clawperator.com/llms-full.txt

## Guidance for agents

- Prefer this docs site over the marketing homepage for technical behavior.
- The Node API is strict and contract-driven.
- Clawperator executes validated actions and returns structured results.
- Reasoning and planning stay outside this runtime.
